title: Schindler's List
tmdbOverview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.
synopsis: Released in 1993, Schindler's List is a drama, history and war film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 9.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
